content: I've been experimenting with team building on my own despite playing the game for 4 days and looked up some guides to adjust WoD

Well, it is enough to get you started.
As you go through arc 1, you will find out what works best for you.
I recommand trying some caro and aequor teams too.

Hihi!!! Im a new player of this game and i love the gameplay and characters but Im confused on what teams to build and the builds on each character along with who to pull !! So help some and advice are very appreciated to me🥹🥹

Hello there : )

Thaïs-Saya-Agrippa-Sorel is a favorite of mine though I tend to avoid putting Saya and Sorel in the same team  when I can.

Wanda is awesome in my opinion and Clementine doesn't clash too much with her as soon as you get Wanda's rouse.

Nymphaea is a nice poison-dealer if that's what your're gunning for.
Tawil is an all-rounder, worth trying in any team to get a feel of her capabilities.

At any rate, you already have some decent awakeners so I would suggest just dive into the story mode with whatever team you like the most. There won't be too much challenge for the first few chapter if you follow the level recommandations and that should give yu time enough to decide what realm/mechanic you enjoy most.

Also, there is a benefit to upgrading a lot of awakener so I wouldn't be shy about it up to lvl 20, and lvl 40 for your favorites.
( You will find out about this later, first complete the starting chapters and get a feel of this marvelous universe 😉 )

I personally love playing poison and any team that has Halemn in it because hes a fav of mine

And I also linda want to try Daffolid out because I have her 4 times and it feels a waste to not use her<:crying:1365591291370405919>

Ahah : )

Well get on to it then !
Piece of advice for Daff : do try every option at least once.

So Daffodil-Wanda-Hameln and Nymphaea could work.
And if you ever stumble on Arachne ? I suggest trying to swap to use her with a poison team, see how it feels.
Tysm!!! I also am confused on how to build characters cuz I trried loolong guides but cant find any
Im sorry im asking too much but Im also curious on the tentacle poisom team cuz I once played with it and I want to improve on who should I use

Not asking too much ^^

For now, just focus on getting your favorites to lvl 20, then 40.
By then, you should have a better understanding of how things work.
I suggest not spending too much currency into the shop until you figure out how to gather more of each ressource.
I'd say Nympha-Faros-Myriam for starters. And you can throw in Hameln ; )
My advice : Don't upgrade anyone past lvl 40 before you have a strong 3 main teams to boost
Tysm!!
My pleasure. Welcome to the bink of the abyss ~

Well, moonless guide is usefull in that you choose which 4 awakener you pull.
So even if you pull the others, that could be enough as you still get to strengthen them.
Another option is the go to  the standard banner ( I would *not* recommand spending only siver on them though, only cores ).
Give it enough time and Thaïs will drop.

For now, I would suggest getting on with the storyline with whatever team you can gather and find out each awaknener rythm and the game's overall mechanic, giving you a chance to see an awakener from the limited banner that you want.

You have 30 days to use your moonless guide so there's no hurry on that front.
alright I'll just stick with my team for now. Thank you for the advice! <:Horla_shy:1468259514091573350>

Many thanks for the tips and the channel info !
Lezzgo try that
Hi I'm not a beginner but i want to know, what do i get when the character is already E12 but i get another copy? Whenever i check my inventory, there's nothing new. Someone pls help!
Nevermind, found it T_T

You get a selector fragment

10 of those give you a limited selector
